nasb.text: For this reason God gave them over to degrading passions; for their women exchanged the natural function for that which is unnatural,

esv.text: For this reason God gave them up to dishonorable passions. For their women exchanged natural relations for those that are contrary to nature;

cnv.text: 因此，　神就任憑他們放縱可恥的情慾：他們的女人把原來的性的功能，變成違反自然的功能；

ccb.text: 因此，上帝任凭他们放纵可耻的情欲。女人放弃正常的两性关系，做出变态反常的事。

csbs.text: 为此，神任凭他们陷入可耻的情欲，连他们的女人也把天性的功用变为违反天性的；
